name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: They all want to know one thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

June 30th marks the last FEC fundraising deadline before the presidential debates begin -- and it's easily the most important I've ever faced.

The national media and Big Government members of BOTH parties are going to scour every line of my campaign's financial report because they want to know one thing...

Does my campaign have the grassroots muscle it will take to WIN?

Can we possibly capitalize on all those polls showing me at or near the top in key GOP Primary states like New Hampshire and leading Hillary Clinton in General Election swing states like Colorado, Iowa, and Pennsylvania?

With the June 30th deadline rapidly approaching, I must count on your IMMEDIATE action to help my presidential campaign answer with a loud-and-clear "YES!"

**[Fellow Conservative, if you're fed up with the Big Government, big-spending status quo in Washington, D.C., I'm counting on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my End of Quarter Push today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)**.

A strong fundraising quarter will give my campaign the head of steam we need going into the first round of presidential debates.

Without it, I'm afraid I could be a sitting duck in the face of liberal media attacks.

The truth is, even as I write you, the liberal media is up to its old tricks trying to dismiss grassroots patriots like you who want to restore America to its constitutional roots.

Just recently, one cable news outlet was caught red-handed manipulating their on-screen graphics to make it appear that my campaign was trailing other GOP candidates in head-to-head matchups with Hillary Clinton -- when my campaign continues to post the BEST poll numbers!

Then, this same news outlet just simply left my name off of a poll that included eight of my Republican opponents -- but listed three who hadn't even announced!

_You can bet this won't be the last time they try to marginalize or ignore you and me_.

After all, every poll showing my campaign's growing strength exposes the media's LIE that the only way our Republican Party can win in 2016 is by nominating another weak-kneed candidate from the mushy middle.

Hasn't our Republican Party been there, done that and paid the price?

Just in recent weeks, we learned one former Clintonista posing now as a "fair and objective" reporter contributed $75,000 to Hillary Clinton's Foundation!

_This is who our national media wants moderating Republican debates_?

Someone who's already proven he's in the tank for the Clintons?

I believe it's time we stopped letting the media pick our Republican Party's nominees.

Instead, I believe it's time our Republican Party nominates a candidate who boldly stands for core Republican principles like:

*** CUTTING SPENDING. Our $18.2 TRILLION debt isn't due to the fact that Washington, D.C. isn't taxing enough. Today, Washington, D.C. rakes in 51% more in taxes than it did just six years ago. The only way to right the ship in Washington, D.C. is by cutting spending in all areas;

*** ENACTING A BALANCED BUDGET AMENDMENT to stop politicians from piling debts on our children and grandchildren they can never repay;

*** CUTTING TAXES. Lower taxes are proven to create jobs because hardworking Americans spend the money they earn better than some bureaucrat in Washington, D.C. It's time to unleash prosperity by dramatically lowering taxes for ALL American citizens;

*** PASSING TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C.;

*** FORCING MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO ACTUALLY READ THE BILLS THEY PASS, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's being voted on;

*** REPEALING ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals, and poorer quality healthcare that have all resulted from this outrageous federal takeover;

*** AUDITING THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in boom-bust economic cycles like the recent housing and financial crises;

*** PROTECTING THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting not just our religious liberties, political speech, and gun rights. It also means ending unconstitutional NSA spying to protect Americans' right to privacy under the Fourth Amendment.

That's what I stand for.

That's the bold vision I believe will not only win back the White House for our Republican Party, but can also restore freedom and prosperity in America once again.

So I will NOT back down, and I will NOT let our national media get away with the same ugly SMEARS they used to try to destroy Republican candidates in the past.

_Today, polls show only 28% of the American people think our country is headed in the right direction_.

Yet, I'm afraid there are members of my own Republican Party who offer little more than the same Big Government status quo.

They push nonsense like Common Core, REFUSE to say whether or not they'd raise taxes, and believe securing our borders isn't a priority.

In fact, one of my opponents even called UNCONSTITUTIONAL NSA spying "the best part of the Obama administration" and stated he would've happily invaded Iraq "knowing what we know now" about weapons of mass destruction, before flip-flopping and changing his mind.

Our liberal media continues to claim November 2016 will be a showdown between two candidates with yesterday's last names pushing yesterday's ideas.

_But no matter how they try to hide them, polls show they couldn't be more wrong_.

Americans are thirsting for a return to constitutional government.

I believe Americans of all backgrounds want a candidate who will boldly stand strong for principle, our Constitution and our Bill of Rights.

This fundraising quarter is critical.

A big quarter can give my campaign the head of steam we need headed into the presidential debates.

**[Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)**?

I know that's a lot to ask.

It may be far more than you've ever been able to contribute to me in the past.

But whatever you can give, all I ask is that you please be as generous as you can.

**[If $20.16 is just too much, please agree to $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)**.

With time running out until the June 30th fundraising deadline, I'm anxiously awaiting your response.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620602:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620603:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620604:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620605:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. With the first round of presidential debates right around the corner, the June 30th fundraising deadline is the most important I've ever faced.

Your support will give me the head of steam I need.

Without it, I'm afraid I could be a sitting duck in the face of liberal media attacks.

That's why I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE support.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my campaign's End of Quarter Push TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)**!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620601:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620606:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620607:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28620608:27486074197:m:1:879035888:58E33126A4A497B0A5DB98BE5E752743:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

subject: [Reminder] Supporter Record for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Dear Peter
Below, please find your official Marco Rubio for President
Supporter Record:

Peter
dpwillis67@gmail.com

$7

Pending*

>>Click here to make a donation and update your record<<
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42654215:17736444537:m:3:1349778030:96311D57CCCDF0039927C35868F87ADF:r

Why are we sending this notice?

Why are we sending this notice? We're just one week away from the
first major fundraising deadline of our campaign. We are asking
all of our supporters to make a donation of any amount before
this critical deadline to ensure we have the highest supporter
participation level possible.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42654215:17736444537:m:3:1349778030:96311D57CCCDF0039927C35868F87ADF:r

Thanks in advance for your support!

Team Marco

* If you have made a donation within the last 72 hours, please
disregard this notice.

This record reflects online donations associate with this email
address only. If you have contributed via mail or phone or with a
different email address, please disregard this notice.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Did you see my email yesterday?
body:
All eyes are on our campaign. Do I have your support? | |

---
---
|
Friend, I know everyone gets a lot of email, but I did want to make certain you received my message yesterday.

**In my email, I asked if you would[please show your support to my campaign before next Tuesday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28627707:27492523157:m:1:877327319:5DCDD15A22324DE7A197D4E9A79335A0:r).**

_Why next Tuesday?_ Well, that is the last day of June and therefore is our campaign's urgent End of Quarter deadline.

All eyes are on our campaign and the media will be using the numbers we report to measure the support and strength we have. **I need your urgent help to show them that we have the strength of thousands across this great nation.**

[**If you support our campaign then won't you please chip in to show your support by following this link?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28627707:27492523157:m:1:877327319:5DCDD15A22324DE7A197D4E9A79335A0:r)

Thank you for your support.

\-- Lindsey

P.S. Less than a week remains until our critical End Of Quarter deadline and your support has never been more crucial to our campaign. **[Please make a contribution by following this link.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28627707:27492523157:m:1:877327319:5DCDD15A22324DE7A197D4E9A79335A0:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28627707:27492523157:m:1:877327319:5DCDD15A22324DE7A197D4E9A79335A0:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative, I have some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The press is ready to write the stories about "inevitable" candidates and their special interest big bucks.

A strong fundraising quarter will fire a shot across the bow of anyone who believes the Presidency is determined by "whose turn it is."

And with polls showing me leading Hillary Clinton in Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania there is one question on everyone's mind...

Do I have the grassroots muscle to win?

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the June 30th fundraising deadline to help to make the answer to that question a loud and clear"YES!"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628098:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)**

Fellow Conservative, this report is critical.

With polls proving I am the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton the media is sure to pull from their bag of tricks to minimize conservatives.

They would like nothing more than to make this election a contest between yesterday's candidates spouting off yesterday's failed policies.

You and I know DISASTER follows when we allow the media to pick our candidates.

To win this election our party must nominate a candidate who will upend the Big Government status quo by boldly championing our conservative values.

I proved with my filibuster that forced President Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire...

... And my 14.5% flat tax proposal that kicks the IRS out of your life for good...

... I am in this race to defeat the Washington Machine!

And a strong End of Quarter fundraising report will prove to the press I have the grassroots behind me.

Allowing the media to select our party's nominee is bad news for our chances against Hillary Clinton.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my End of Quarter Money Bomb before the June 30th deadline and help my campaign build a head of steam](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628098:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628098:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?june-30&sr=rhf062415n1")
**Contributed to End of Quarter Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628099:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628100:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)

[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628098:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628098:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628103:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628104:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28628105:27493061404:m:1:879035888:CC2F81EEF265066C812949305EEBD992:r)

name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: I can’t promise crab cakes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Want to have dinner with Hillary? | Friend --

Over the last twenty years, I’ve had the honor of gathering together countless powerful women of the Senate for dinner to share tips, hopes, and more than a few crab cakes.

I started these dinners as a way of getting to know the women I worked with. Sitting down to a meal with someone you respect can be inspiring -- and the appetizers weren’t bad, either.

Now you have the chance to sit down to a meal with one inspiring woman in particular: Hillary Clinton. I can’t promise crab cakes, but I know the conversation will be unforgettable.

**[Sign up before midnight tomorrow to be automatically entered for your chance to win.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI5MTAwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMzU3MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This is your chance have a real conversation with the next President of the United States about your hopes and dreams for our country. The campaign will cover your travel and accommodations, so all you have to worry about is which question you're going to ask Hillary first.

I can tell you firsthand that dinners like these are an experience you'll remember forever.

**Add your name before tomorrow's midnight deadline:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI5MTAwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMzU3MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Barbara Mikulski

Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5MTAwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMzU3MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Deadline:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Patrick has a primary challenger. Friend -- I wanted to take a moment to tell you how proud I am of this campaign and what we've accomplished so far. I'm running because I love Florida and have a strong desire to serve Floridians every way I can. And I think we've built a campaign that Florida can be proud of. Just as important: We're building a campaign that can win. But we can't get there without your support. The crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is less than one week away -- June 30. With a primary looming, it's more important than ever that we show the strength of my campaign. Democrats need to know that I'm the candidate who can take us to victory in November. Because we're running a campaign that will make Florida proud. **We've set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 over the next seven days. Can I count on you to ensure we get there by making a contribution today?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-24_EOQ1_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Dinner?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend --

I'd love for you to be there when we sit down for dinner this summer.

All you have to do is say you want to be there, and you'll be in the running.

Flight and hotel are covered for you and your guest -- so make sure you’re entered before midnight tomorrow for a chance to meet me for dinner on the campaign trail:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5MTI4NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyMzgwOTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you,

Hillary
